messages.content: # Here is how to fix the " Missing CSP Features " error.

# Step 1
> Delete the Content Manager.exe file
> Delete the AcTools Content Manager in %localappdata%

# Step 2
> Download and install the latest [Content Manager](https://acstuff.club/app/latest.zip) version

# Step 3
> Reinstall the latest Custom Shaders Patch version
